free_text: Neutron activation cross section for Ni isotopes
Samples of different isotopic composition were used
(see 'METHOD'). The samples were prepared by pressing
NiO or pure metal powder into plexiglass containers
of diameter 16 mm. Sample thickness varied from 250 to
In order to resolve (n,p) and (n,np) cross
sections leading to the same activation product,
samples with different isotopic abundances were used
and the contributing cross-sections were deduced
using a linear least squares method.
-self absorption of gamma rays in the sample
Work performed under IAEA Research Agreement 3436/CF
